name: Stuffed Shells with Fennel Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup red bell pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
PASTA: Cook the shells until al dente. Drain and set aside.
FILLING: In a large skillet, sauté garlic over medium heat until fragrant. Add mushrooms, red bell pepper, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook until mushroom liquid evaporates. Stir in tofu and mozzarella cheese. Spoon filling into each shell. Place stuffed shells in a shallow baking dish sprayed with oil.
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
SAUCE: In a separate skillet, sauté scallions for three minutes. Add fennel bulbs, fennel seed, pepper, and salt. Cook until onions are fragrant. Stir in tomatoes with juice and tomato paste. Simmer sauce for five minutes. Pour the sauce over stuffed shells. Cover shells with foil to seal edges. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Remove foil and continue baking for another 5-10 minutes, or until heated through.
